item.title: Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC Q4 FY26: Sharp Profit Decline Raises Concerns Despite Steady AUM Growth
item.description: Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC Ltd., one of India's leading asset management companies with a market capitalisation of ₹29,685 crores, reported a concerning 30.58% quarter-on-quarter decline in consolidated net profit for Q4 FY26, bringing earnings down to ₹187.11 crores from ₹269.52 crores in the previous quarter. On a year-on-year basis, the profit contraction was equally troubling at 17.96%, signalling operational challenges despite maintaining steady revenue momentum. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Sterling & Wilson Renewable Energy Q4 FY26: Strong Quarter Masks Deeper Concerns
item.description: Sterling & Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd. (SWSOLAR), a small-cap construction company with a market capitalisation of ₹5,316 crores, delivered a superficially impressive fourth quarter for FY26, posting consolidated net profit of ₹134.57 crores compared to ₹55.38 crores in Q4 FY25—a year-on-year surge of 142.99%. However, this headline number conceals troubling operational realities that warrant serious investor scrutiny. The stock traded at ₹220.35 on April 23, 2026, up 0.80% on the day, yet remains down 32.28% over the past year, significantly underperforming both the Sensex and its construction sector peers. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: P. H. Capital Q4 FY26: Losses Deepen Despite Revenue Surge as Operational Challenges Mount
item.description: P. H. Capital Ltd., a micro-cap non-banking financial company with a market capitalisation of ₹204.00 crores, reported a net loss of ₹1.60 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a sequential deterioration of 26.98% from the previous quarter's loss of ₹1.26 crores. Whilst net sales surged an extraordinary 1,329.68% quarter-on-quarter to ₹22.16 crores, the company's operational profitability remained deeply negative with an operating margin of -11.10%, highlighting severe execution challenges that have plagued the NBFC for three consecutive quarters. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Tips Music Q4 FY26: Digital Monetisation Drives Record Profitability
item.description: Tips Music Ltd., one of India's oldest and most established players in the media and entertainment industry, delivered a stellar performance in Q4 FY26 (March quarter), posting its highest-ever quarterly net profit of ₹59.06 crores—a remarkable 92.94% surge year-on-year and a modest 0.68% increase quarter-on-quarter. The strong results, driven by robust digital monetisation of its extensive audio content library, propelled the stock to surge 8.23% to ₹646.30 on April 23, 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 1.09% on the same day. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Prozone Realty Joins MomentumNow Stocks on Strong Financial Upswing
item.description: Prozone Realty has been added to the MomentumNow Stocks list as of 23 April 2026, reflecting a significant shift in its financial trajectory and market sentiment. The micro-cap realty firm’s recent quarterly results demonstrate robust growth across key metrics, positioning it as a compelling candidate for momentum-driven investors seeking opportunities in the real estate sector. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are L&T Technology Services Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: L&T Technology Services Ltd's latest results show mixed performance with an 8.34% year-on-year revenue growth and a 6.75% increase in net profit, alongside improved operating margins at 18.24%. However, the stock has declined 22.51% over the past year, reflecting broader market challenges. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: SBI Life Insurance Company's latest Q4 FY26 results show strong net sales growth of 16.02% year-on-year but a concerning decline in profitability, with a net profit decrease of 1.09% and negative operating profit. While top-line growth is solid, the heavy reliance on non-operating income raises sustainability concerns, indicating mixed overall performance. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Skyline Millars Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Skyline Millars Ltd's latest results are concerning, showing zero revenue and a net loss of ₹0.46 crores, marking five consecutive quarters of losses and indicating significant operational challenges and weak capital efficiency. The company needs urgent strategic action to address these issues and restore investor confidence. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Maharashtra Scooters Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Maharashtra Scooters Ltd's latest results are concerning, showing a 9.32% year-on-year decline in net sales and a 92.23% drop in net profit, despite maintaining a high operating margin of 82.59%. The company faces significant revenue volatility and capital efficiency challenges, indicating a need for strategic reassessment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Sangam (India) Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Sangam (India) Ltd's latest results are positive, showing a 20.38% increase in revenue and a 245.27% rise in net profit for Q4 FY26, driven by strong operational performance. However, challenges such as elevated leverage and below-average return ratios suggest the need for cautious monitoring of future sustainability. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Tata Communications Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Tata Communications Ltd reported record quarterly revenue of ₹6,554.15 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a 9.41% year-on-year growth, but faced a significant net profit decline of 74.70% to ₹263.25 crores due to a high tax rate and margin pressures, raising concerns about profitability sustainability. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd's latest results are strong, with a net profit increase of 38.07% and the highest operating margin in seven quarters at 51.15%. However, revenue growth has moderated to 5.05%, indicating some volatility in sales performance. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Havells India Ltd. latest results good or bad?
item.description: Havells India Ltd. reported strong Q4 FY26 results, with net sales of ₹6,705.20 crores (up 20% sequentially) and a net profit of ₹723.06 crores (up 140.39% quarter-on-quarter), indicating a significant operational turnaround. However, investors should watch for sustainability in future performance, especially due to reliance on other income for profit growth. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Trent Ltd. latest results good or bad?
item.description: Trent Ltd.'s latest Q4 FY26 results show year-on-year growth in net sales but a sequential decline, with significant margin compression raising concerns about profitability amid aggressive expansion and rising costs. While net profit increased year-on-year, it fell sequentially, indicating challenges in maintaining operational efficiency in a competitive retail environment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Tech Mahindra Ltd. latest results good or bad?
item.description: Tech Mahindra Ltd.'s latest results are positive, with net sales growing 4.74% to ₹15,076.10 crores and a net profit increase of 20.66% to ₹1,353.80 crores, indicating strong operational performance despite concerns about its premium valuation and long-term growth sustainability. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Amal Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Amal Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth of 94.40% year-on-year, but a significant decline in net profit by 71.98% raises concerns about profitability and operational efficiency. Investors should be cautious due to the compressed operating margins and high effective tax rate. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Delta Corp Ltd. latest results good or bad?
item.description: Delta Corp Ltd.'s latest results are poor, showing a 90% decline in net profit and an 11.72% drop in revenue year-on-year, alongside significant operational challenges and reduced investor confidence. The company continues to face persistent revenue declines and deteriorating profitability in a challenging gaming industry environment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Bharat Coking Coal Q4 FY26: Operational Struggles Deepen Despite Tax Reversal
item.description: Bharat Coking Coal Ltd., the Mini Ratna public sector undertaking and wholly-owned subsidiary of Coal India Limited, reported a marginal net profit of ₹27.28 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a dramatic turnaround from the ₹22.88 crore loss in Q3 FY26. However, this recovery masks deteriorating operational fundamentals, as the company posted its worst quarterly operating performance in recent history with an operating loss of ₹335.26 crores. The stock tumbled 5.13% to ₹34.02 following the results announcement, reflecting investor concerns about the sustainability of the coal mining specialist's business model. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Sarla Performance Fibers Q4 FY26: Massive Loss Erases Year's Gains Amid Exceptional Charges
item.description: Sarla Performance Fibers Ltd., a Dadra-based manufacturer of specialised performance yarns, reported a devastating fourth quarter for FY26, posting a consolidated net loss of ₹59.64 crores compared to a profit of ₹12.69 crores in the year-ago period—a staggering 569.98% decline. The catastrophic quarter-on-quarter deterioration saw profits plunge 1262.57% from ₹5.13 crores in Q3 FY26, completely erasing the gains built over the previous three quarters. The stock reacted violently to the results, plummeting 9.05% to ₹90.00 on April 23, 2026, as investors absorbed the magnitude of exceptional charges that torpedoed what had otherwise been a year of steady operational progress. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Avadh Sugar & Energy Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Avadh Sugar & Energy Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 23 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical and fundamental picture presents a nuanced view, with some indicators supporting the crossover while others suggest caution. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: {{list.post_title}}
item.description: {{list.post_excerpt}} Time: {{list.post_date_sep}}
